hypothesis:
## Novel Hypothesis

Incorporating domain-specific ontology graphs as intermediate reasoning structures between document preprocessing and LLM extraction will improve F1 scores by at least 20% for hierarchical nanomaterial property extraction tasks, as graph-based representations will enable agents to explicitly model the compositional dependencies (e.g., metal → oxide → morphology → catalytic activity) that current single-pass text-to-JSON approaches systematically fail to capture.
